title: Raw Source Record v1
description: Schema for unprocessed records as ingested directly from a registered data source. Records are immutable once written.

record_id.description: Globally unique record identifier (UUIDv4). Generated by the ingestion service.

source_id.description: Unique identifier of the source as registered in source_registry.csv.

ingested_at.description: UTC timestamp at which the record was ingested into the system.

record_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the raw_payload field. Used for deduplication.

raw_payload.description: The unmodified source data blob. Structure varies by source_id.

crawler_version.description: Semantic version of the crawler or adapter that produced this record.

tags.description: Optional free-form classification tags applied at ingest time.

source_url.description: The specific URL or endpoint from which this record was retrieved.

http_status.description: HTTP status code returned by the source at ingestion time.
